name: Resorcinol
description: Resorcinol is used as a coloring in hair dyes (ColorIndex: CI 76505). However, "it is the rubber industry that is the largest user of resorcinol (about 50%) and it is also used for the manufacture of high quality wood glues (about 25%). Other uses include dye manufacture, pharmaceuticals, flame retardants, agrochemicals, fungicide creams and lotions, and hair dyes. " (WHO source)On a notice published in 2013, the SCCS (Europe) concluded that "Resorcinol is a powerful sensitizer."Studies suspect the substance of being an endocrine disruptor:In humans, thyroid effects, CNS disorders and erythrocyte abnormalities have been attributed to resorcinol exposure Skin sensitization to resorcinol is well known but rare in practice, and the available data cannot assess the effective sensitizing action of this coumpound. " (WHO source)
note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах.

name: Retinol
description: Retinol is produced synthetically, but is naturally present in animal fats, fish liver oil and plants containing beta-carotene. Retinol is a natural form of vitamin A, which works by reducing the appearance of wrinkles and increasing the thickness and elasticity of the skin.It is prohibited in organic products.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Retinoic Acid
description: Retinoic Acid — косметический ингредиент.
note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании.

name: Rapeseedamidopropyl Ethyldimonium Ethosulfate
description: This ingredient is REACH ecotoxic (Aquatic Acute 1, Aquatic Chronic 1) and not readily biodegradable
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Ravensara Aromatica Leaf Oil
description: Ravensara Aromatica Leaf Oil — косметический ингредиент. Происхождение: Vegetal.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Retinyl Palmitate
description: Retinyl palmitate is an esterified form of vitamin A, widely used in anti-aging cosmetics. It is considered more stable and better tolerated by the skin than retinol (Vitamin A).
note: Low penalty in all categories. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании. Происхождение: Animal.

name: Ricinus Communis Seed Oil
description: Castor oil is a vegetable oil extracted from seeds, it is mainly made up of fatty acids (mostly ricinoleic acid). This oil is used because of its numerous properties in cosmetics: it promotes the uniform distribution of pigments in a cosmetic product, it penetrates the stratum corneum and acts in depth, it moisturizes and protects. In hair care, it has toning properties and protects the hair (film-forming agent). It is also very used in lip care, it makes them soft and gives them shine. In makeup, it is used to promote a good distribution of colors. It is allowed in organic.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.
